<!-- indicator: fig-od-anyopioid-crude -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-od-anyopioid-crude
#| fig-cap: 'Overdose Deaths Involving Any Opioid, Crude Rate per 100,000 Population, 2019–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Overdose Deaths Involving Any Opioid, Crude Rate per 100,000 Population, 2019–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-od-anyopioid-crude", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
